sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43652" key="eu)diaske/dastos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐδια-σκέδαστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n43652.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easily spread</tr_>, of a plaster, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:9:37:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.37.7</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n43652.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easily dispersed</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἡδονή</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2640.tlg001:63" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.Mynd.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">63</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
